blocks.text: Norway's night in Lisbon — and three more CL classics to follow
Bodo/Glimt travel to Lisbon perfectly level on aggregate — an Arctic club one leg from the Champions League quarter-finals. Four all-square ties make this one of the great European Tuesday nights.

blocks.label: ⚽ Wednesday CL — last chance saloon
items: ⚽ 21:00 — Liverpool need an Anfield miracle, trailing Galatasaray 0-1 on aggregate
⚽ 18:45 — Barcelona vs Newcastle, level at Camp Nou — winner takes all
